description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, these heels work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 1.5"Product DetailsCriss-crossing black forefoot straps with a gold brand patch at the centreLight brown textured footbed with gold heel patchTPR outsole with a kitten heel (that has a plastic heel cap)Material and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
